attacking_style: Launches late-race attacks from established breakaways, specifically timing moves at the flamme rouge (1km to go) to capitalize on reduced group cohesion.
team_tactics: EF unable to place supporting riders in critical breakaway selections, leaving Kaithebo to execute attacks in isolation without teammate protection or follow-up pressure.
terrain_preference: Unknown - insufficient data across varied terrain types to establish clear preference patterns.
vulnerability: Isolated attacks from breakaways are vulnerable to coordinated bridging efforts by multiple opponents, particularly when lacking team support in the decisive selection.
key_patterns: Attacks at flamme rouge from breakaways, timing moves in final kilometer.
Races without EF teammates in decisive groups, operating as lone representative.
Vulnerable to coordinated responses when isolated, neutralized by multi-rider bridges.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation insufficient to determine trajectory, though showed willingness to attack from breakaway
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 11
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 11
